message.content:
@startuml
title CSE & Hosted Resources

participant "Notebook\nAE" as Notebook
participant "CSE" as CSE
participant "StreetLight-AE-1\nLight-Container-1" as StreetLight1
participant "StreetLight-AE-2\nLight-Container-2" as StreetLight2

Notebook -> CSE: GET /opt
activate CSE

CSE -> StreetLight1: RETRIEVE <container>\ncse-in/StreetLight-AE-1/Light-Container-1
activate StreetLight1
StreetLight1 --> CSE: Response
deactivate StreetLight1

CSE -> StreetLight2: RETRIEVE <container>\ncse-in/StreetLight-AE-2/Light-Container-2
activate StreetLight2
StreetLight2 --> CSE: Response
deactivate StreetLight2

deactivate CSE

@enduml
